executive_summary: This is a fictional sample report for an example garage in Greater Manchester. It includes representative findings across all SIGNAL stages without exposing real data.

findings.title: Public domain resolves correctly
findings.observation: The primary domain resolves to a single IP address with a valid A record.
findings.interpretation: Correct DNS configuration contributes to service availability.
findings.retest_method: Requery DNS records after any configuration changes.

findings.title: Missing privacy notice
findings.observation: The website lacks a visible privacy notice or cookie policy on the homepage. A request to /privacy returns a 404 error.
findings.evidence: No link labelled 'privacy' or 'cookie' found in the footer or header; accessing https://example.invalid/privacy returns 404 (Privacy notice 404).
findings.interpretation: Customers may hesitate to submit enquiries when privacy commitments are unclear.
findings.recommendation: Publish a clear privacy notice and link it prominently in the footer.
findings.retest_method: Verify presence and accessibility of privacy notice.
findings.limitation: Observation limited to homepage without navigating deeper due to passive collection rules.

24_hour: Draft and publish a privacy notice with clear data-handling commitments.
30_day: Develop a plan to improve mobile response times and update visual content.
summary_actions.prototype: Consider creating a simple booking form to streamline customer enquiries.
